_comment: Static slide motion engine — holds a still keyframe for duration_s with optional film grain. Used for title cards, beat slides, end cards. Renders an animated WEBP; swap node 50 for VHS_VideoCombine when MP4 is needed. Inputs are patched by RishaPlanExecutor or the orchestrator at queue time.

10._comment: Source still — set image to <keyframe_id>.png. For pure title cards (k001, k012, k015, ...), this is a pre-rendered slide; for ken_burns-routed scenes downgraded to static, it's the diffused keyframe.

20._comment: Plan row — supplies duration via timestamp_start/timestamp_end.

30._comment: Motion selector — for static rows this returns kind=static_slide, duration_s, curve=linear, params={}. We use duration_s only; the rest is consumed by audit nodes.

40._comment: Hold the still for the selected duration with subtle film grain. Set grain_intensity=0 for a bit-exact freeze (cheaper, but reads as frozen). 0.012 is the explainer-video default — visible grain without colour shift.

50._comment: v1 output — animated WEBP. Replace with VHS_VideoCombine (format=video/h264-mp4) when MP4 is required.

60._comment: Audit — surfaces what the selector + renderer did.
